zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Grey於大約1365年出生在英國諾圖波藍德時，她的父親Thomas de Heaton44歲，母親Margaret de Percy34歲。她於大約1380年與Thomas Umfraville結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1420年10月25日在英國享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Grey于大约1365年出生在英国諾圖波藍德时，她的父亲Thomas de Heaton44岁，母亲Margaret de Percy34岁。她于大约1380年与Thomas Umfraville结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1420年10月25日在英国享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Grey was born about 1365, in Northumberland, England, her father, Thomas de Heaton, was 44 and her mother, Margaret de Percy, was 34. She married Thomas Umfraville about 1380. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. She died on 25 October 1420, in England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Grey est née environ 1365, à Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Heaton, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Percy, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Umfraville environ 1380. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 octobre 1420, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Grey um 1365 in Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Heaton 44 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Percy 34. Sie hat um 1380 Thomas Umfraville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Oktober 1420 im Alter von 56 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Grey è nata il circa 1365 nel Northumberland, England, sua padre, Thomas de Heaton, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Percy, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Umfraville circa 1380. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì il 25 ottobre 1420, nel England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Greyが約1365年にイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Thomas de Heatonは44歳，母Margaret de Percyは34歳であった。約1380年にThomas Umfravilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1420年10月25日にイギリスで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Grey(이)가 대략 1365년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Heaton(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Percy(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1380년 Thomas Umfraville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1420년 10월 25일 영국에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Grey nasceu aproximadamente 1365, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Heaton, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Percy, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Umfraville aproximadamente 1380. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de outubro de 1420, em Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Grey родилась около 1365 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de Heaton было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Percy, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Umfraville около 1380 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 25 октября 1420 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Grey nació aproximadamente 1365, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Heaton, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Margaret de Percy, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Thomas Umfraville aproximadamente 1380. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió el 25 de octubre de 1420, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
